sections.changelog:
Update: 1.2.1 - December 11, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Automatic Notifications! - You've heard that right – you can now send notifications to a 3rd party tool! Currently we have integrations with Slack and Discord and will include Telegram in the next update. The API is also already usable, although not mentioned anywhere in the settings. We will make the next update focus on the API so you can connect any tool of your choice with MagicChecklists!
  • 🎉 NEW: Shortcodes for Checklists! - You can activate shortcodes for checklists for each checklist individually. You will be presented a bunch of styling options as well as conditions on what should be displayed inside the shortcode. You can also deactivate the drawer here, if you don't need it. Works with every builder that supports shortcodes! Place your checklists anywhere!
  • 🎉 NEW: Automatic Checklist Reset! - You can now set a custom time schedule on which the checklist should reset automatically. This way list items will automatically be unchecked again, perfect for repetitive tasks.
  • 🎉 NEW: Checklist Conditions! - Expanding the access and permission control update from v1.2, you can now set custom conditions for the checklist to be loaded. You can choose between everywhere, wordpress related pages (like dashboard, settings etc.) and even insert custom URLs / URL patterns!
  • 🎉 NEW: Toggle through checklists! - There is a new settings page available inside the plugin pages, so you can activate / deactivate this for all checklists globally. If enabled, you will see 2 arrows inside the drawer, making it easier to toggle through all open checklists without needing to press any shortcuts or floating buttons.
  • 🎉 NEW: Uninstaller! - Finally you can properly get rid of all MagicChecklists related data when uninstalling this plugin. We won't leave any junk behind in your database, when this is enabled in the new settings page.
  • 🎉 NEW: Tags & Colors! - What are checklists without any proper organization? Well, we've got you covered. You can now better organize your checklists using tags with associated colors.
  • 🎉 NEW: Switch form appearance! - You can switch between top to bottom and side by side appearance on the checklist creation / edit form.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Uninstaller now also deletes the new tables from the database.

Update: 1.2 - December 02, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Granular Access Control is finally here! Set precise access and permission controls on user roles, individual users, invite link users and on public checklists as well! You can get very granular and pick just the right access and permission needed for each checklist individually.
  • 🎉 NEW: Locking Mechanism. Since multiple users can now edit the same checklist, we need to be consistent with saving the checklist. The locking mechanism is automatically applied on all users with Edit permissions, so that only 1 user can edit the checklist at the same time. This way we ensure data consistency across all users and changes not getting lost anymore.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: We have overhauled the checklist creation process. You will now face a clean, streamlined multip-step form to create and edit checklists. Better UI, more productivity boosted.
  • 🛠️ FIX:
    Some minor fixes in the codebase for better maintainability and scalablity.

Hotfix: 1.1.2.1 - November 19, 2024

  • 🛠️ FIX: I got too excited adding the public checklist handling methods. I forgot about non-public checklists. 'Per User' checked state handling now works again for non-public checklists.

Update: 1.1.2 - November 19, 2024

  • 🎉 NEW: Clickable Links and More! You can now paste URLs into a list item and it will be converted into a hyperlink automatically. Additionally you can select any existing text which will trigger a link insertion popup. This way you can turn any text into a hyperlink!
  • 🎉 NEW: Rate Limiting. You can now optionally enable rate limits for your checklists individually. This is especially handy for public checklists on websites that are prone to bots or spamers.
  • 📈 IMPROVE: Got rid of the CDN depency for SortableJS. It is now its own file.
  • 📣 ANNOUNCEMENT: Now we will focus fully on the granular access control system. This will also include a complete overhaul of the current checklist creation process. We will make it way more userfriendly and appealing to use. Think of multi step forms. Stay tuned. 👀

Update Info: 1.1.1.1 - November 14, 2024

  • INFO: You have to set a trigger for your checklist to open when updating to the latest version. This is because you can now decide to either use only shortcuts, only floating buttons or both.
  • IMPROVE: UI changes of the drawer to make it easier to use, especially on mobile.

Update: 1.1.1 - November 14, 2024

  • NEW: Introducing part 1 of the granular access control: Public Access. Enable public access to your checklist. Visitors can open it either through the shortcut, or through a floating button. Visitors can check off items, uncheck them again and rearrange the order of list items. Every user will have his/her own checked state handling (per user). An example can be seen on the MagicPlugins website.
  • NEW: Floating Buttons! Now you can decide how checklists should open. Switch on/off Shortcuts (the standard way) and Floating Buttons. You can even use both at the same time.
  • FIX: Fixed a small loading issue within Bricksbuilder, where 2 instances of checklists were loaded. Now it correctly loads one instance in the main DOM and propagates shortcut inputs from within the Bricks iframe to the Bricks main DOM.

Update: 1.1.0 - November 07, 2024

  • NEW: Added a priority selector on checklist and list item level. Priorities will be visible by an indicating color OR number.
  • IMPROVE: Small UI update: remove button and drag handle will now only be visible while hovering over an item.
  • IMPROVE: Complete restructure of the codebase. It's now modular to allow granular control over what files should load on which trigger. This is also the first step towards Granular Access control.

Official Release: 1.0.0 - November 03, 2024

  • RELEASE: We finally made it! This update marks the first official release of MagicChecklists!
  • IMPROVE: Minor optical improvements
  • IMPROVE: Limit of active checklists set from 5 to 10. There is a limit in the first place to keep performance lightning fast.

Beta 1.2.0 – November 01,2024

  • NEW: A little confetti animation when checking off all list items.
  • NEW: A new button to uncheck all list items inside the drawer.
  • IMPROVE: A revamp of the UI to make it ready for official release.
  • IMPROVE: Better documentation on all MagicChecklist plugin pages.
  • IMPROVE: Ensured compatibility with Pagebuilders like Bricks and Elementor.
  • FIX: Shortcut binding form field now works as intended and can be exited with mouse, Enter or Tab.

1.1.2 – October 28, 2024

  • Added new Delete All button on the edit page
  • Replaced the remove text with a short, red x
  • Really small UI changes. UI will be revamped at official launch.
  • Bug fix: no more endless item duplication inside the drawer, when creating new items after closing the drawer multiple times without a pagereload

1.1.1 – October 27, 2024

  • A few changes to the UI for a smoother navigation.

1.0.0 – October 25, 2024

  • Initial Beta Release
